sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_intervals (id INT PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL HOUR TO SECOND);
INSERT INTO time_intervals (id, duration) VALUES (1, INTERVAL '5:30:15' HOUR TO SECOND);
UPDATE time_intervals SET duration = duration + INTERVAL '1:00:00' HOUR TO SECOND WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration, duration * INTERVAL '2:00:00' HOUR TO SECOND AS doubled_duration FROM time_intervals;
DELETE FROM time_intervals WHERE duration < INTERVAL '1:00:00' HOUR TO SECOND;
